scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold text-slate-800

typography.notes: Do not use Inter. Keep headings tight and bold. Use Manrope for high legibility in the dashboard data.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Use Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Stretch children to match neighbors using h-full.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards and modals. Input elements rounded-lg.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background (#ffffff), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), subtle shadow-sm. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-md, border-slate-300.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Deep navy (#1e3a5f) background, no borders needed. Active nav items should have a subtle white/10 background or an orange left-border accent.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background (bg-slate-50/80 backdrop-blur-md) with 1px border-b border-slate-200.
surface_strategies.badges: Soft background with high contrast text. E.g., bg-orange-100 text-orange-800.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#1e3a5f] text-white hover:bg-slate-800. Accent: bg-[#f97316] text-white hover:bg-orange-600. Add smooth transition-all duration-200. Add data-testid attributes to all buttons.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Left align data, right align numbers/actions. Row hover: bg-slate-50.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select. Ensure inputs have ring-orange-500 focus states to tie into the accent color.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Max-width 2xl. Include a subtle glassmorphism overlay (bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons/cards must have hover states. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Focus states must use ring-2 ring-orange-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-white.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer motion for page entry: opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0.

login_hero.description: Modern university campus exterior for the left side of the split login page. Apply a deep navy (bg-[#1e3a5f]/40) overlay to ensure any superimposed text remains readable.

resource_room_1.description: Modern conference room for resource booking cards.

resource_room_2.description: Large lecture hall for resource booking cards.

admin_avatar.description: Avatar for admin or manager roles.

iconography: lucide-react for standard crisp icons. For the sidebar, use 20px size icons, strokeWidth 2.
testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
